description.value:
Disease: Demon Fever — Severity: [Deadly] — Stage 3

Effects: As Stage 2. The character cannot benefit from long rests — their pneuma is too disrupted to settle. Luck does not restore on rest.

Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each long rest (Hard task — 2 successes cures; 1 success = no change; 0 = worsen). Magical healing alone suppresses symptoms for 24 hours but does not cure; Major Restoration cures completely.

system.vector: Daemon claws or bites, nexus-adjacent contamination, exposure to corrupted pneuma
system.specialRules: Character cannot benefit from long rests — their pneuma is too disrupted. Luck does not restore on rest.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Demon Fever (Stage 3).
